dialogue_text: and take this young lady to see the Mock Turtle, and to hear his history. I must go back and see after some executions I have ordered;
source_excerpt: They very soon came upon a Gryphon, lying fast asleep in the sun. (If you don't know what a Gryphon is, look at the picture.) "Up, lazy thing!" said the Queen, "and take this young lady to see the Mock Turtle, and to hear his history. I...
